search_summary.note: No dedicated WHOLESALE-ONLY spectacle lens distributors were found within Rajapalayam city itself. All shops listed are retail optical showrooms that also supply to trade/wholesale customers. Most are multi-brand opticians dealing in spectacle lenses, contact lenses, frames, sunglasses, and optical accessories. For pure wholesale, dealers in Chennai or Madurai may need to be sourced.

key_observations: Rajapalayam is a tier-3 town in Virudhunagar district. Most optical businesses here are retail showrooms, not dedicated wholesale distributors.
Sha Opticals appears to be the most well-stocked dealer with premium lens brands (ZEISS, Essilor, Hoya).
Star Optical has the strongest digital presence with multiple branches and IndiaMART listing - they may also serve as a supplier.
For bulk/wholesale lens procurement, Rajapalayam retailers typically source from Chennai-based wholesalers or direct from lens manufacturers (Essilor, ZEISS, Hoya, GKB).

The Justdial listings for Rajapalayam show categories: Contact Lens Dealers, Optical Lens Dealers, Spectacle Dealers, Spectacle Glass Dealers, and Optical Frame Dealers - all pointing to the same set of retail optical shops.
Phone numbers were verified across multiple sources (Justdial, A2V.in, Facebook, Instagram, IndiaMART).
